column1: Citation: Graham, J.L., Dubrovsky, N.M., Loftin, K.A., Rosen, B.H., and Stelzer, E.A., 2021, Cyanotoxin, chlorophyll-a, and cyanobacterial toxin genetic data for samples collected at eleven large river sites throughout the United States, June through October 2018: U.S. Geological Survey data release, https://doi.org/10.5066/P98RPC1E.

This file contains the cyanotoxin, chlorophyll, and cyanobacterial toxin genetic data for samples collected at eleven large river sites throughout the United States, from June through October 2018. Definitions of column headings presented in the "Cyanotoxins_Chl_Genetics_Data" tab are presented below.
USGS Station ID, USGS station identification number where samples were collected (01184000, 01463500, 01578310, 02338000, 03303280, 05331580, 06892350, 06934500, 08057410, 11447650, and 14211720).

USGS Station Name, USGS station name where samples were collected (Connecticut  River at Thompsonville, CT; Delaware River at Trenton, NJ; Susquehanna River at Conowingo, MD; Chattahoochee River near Whitesburg, GA; Ohio River at Cannelton Dam at Cannelton, OH; Mississippi River at Hastings, MN; Kansas River at De Soto, KS; Missouri River at Hermann, MO; Trinity River below Dallas, TX; Sacramento River at Freeport, CA; and Willamette River at Portland, OR).
Sample Date, Date samples were collected in MM/DD/YYYY.
Sample Time, Time samples were collected in HH:MM; "NA" indicates lab replicate and no time offset.
Sample Type, Type of sample collected (Regular, Concurrent Replicate, or Laboratory Replicate).

Data qualifiers for Total microcystins plus nodularins, data qualifiers for attribute labeled Total microcystins plus nodularins (ug/L); <; less than symbol indicates concentration was less than the laboratory reporting level.

Total microcystins plus nodularins (ug/L), Total microcystins plus nodularins, unfiltered water, freeze/thaw extraction. ADDA specific enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay, recoverable, micrograms per liter (USGS parameter code 89011); refer to prior attribute for associated data qualifier; "NM" indicates value was not measured.
